fieldValues.value: **36.** Every `TypeRef.typeId` referenced in any `Schema.rootTypes[]`, `Schema.requiredTypes[]`, or in any `RelationSpec.sourceType` or `RelationSpec.targetType` within `Schema.structure[]`, for each Schema in `Package.schemas[]`, must appear in `Package.dependencyRefs` with `definitionType: "type"`. If `mode === "bundled"`, each such Type must be present in `Package.types[]`.

sourceRefs.note: Subsection 08-17 from srs-spec.md - coarse source anchoring during migration
